title: Warm up
content: The slide features images representing three Chinese cities: Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou, as seen through the perspective of a car driver. Each image highlights unique aspects of the respective cities.

title: An Evolving Nation
content: The slide presents a theme about the evolution occurring within China, highlighting a journey through different cities. The visuals include a taxi and images representing vibrant urban and historical settings in China.

title: Session 1 Match the City Chain!
content: This slide outlines an investigative session to match city chains, focusing on local features, development strategies, and their outcomes and positive impact.

title: Match the city to its development strategy
content: The slide correlates three cities with their development strategies: Beijing with technology and tradition integration, Chongqing with sustainable urban development, and Hangzhou with tourism and economic growth.

title: Through the eyes of taxi drivers…
content: The slide illustrates development strategies of Chinese cities from a taxi driver's perspective. It highlights the strategies of sustainable urban development, tourism and economic growth, and technology and tradition integration as essential for city development.
